headlines.headline: Dralol Computing reports record quarterly revenue, up 20% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Revising long-term strategy indicates a pivot, which introduces significant uncertainty regarding future execution and financial results.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
